name: Spawn Experience Orb
desc: Spawns an experience orb entity with position and XP value.

implementation.overview: Spawns an XP orb entity. XpBottle / AutoEP modules may track XP orb positions. No module in the primary client sources (Rise, Sigma, Jigsaw, RektSky, Memeware, Aqua) specifically targets this packet beyond the vanilla handler.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S11PacketSpawnExperienceOrb)
modules.purpose: Server sends S11PacketSpawnExperienceOrb to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
